title: 2 Pack Hamper Baskets for Gifts Empty, Woven Gift Baskets with Accessories (Cellophane, Lafite Grass, Cards, Ribbon) for Birthday, Easter, Baby, Wedding (30×20×12 cm)
features: 【Complete Empty Basket Kit】This 2-Pack Empty Gift Basket set includes all accessories: 2 woven baskets (blue & pink), cellophane bags, raffia grass, bows, and greeting cards. Solve your last-minute gifting stress—simply fill and wrap for a stunning, professional-looking present in minutes

【Premium Hand-Woven Build】Each Hamper Basket measures 11.8”x7.9”x4.7”, ideal for wine, treats. Made from durable, natural cotton rope with reinforced sewing, it safely holds weight without breaking, ensuring your thoughtful gift arrives intact

【Elegant Presentation】Integrated ergonomic handles are woven for comfort and strength, easily carrying bottles or gifts. Paired with clear cellophane and decorative grass, it creates an elegant, ready-to-gift appearance that impresses for birthdays, weddings, or baby showers

【Time-Saving Ready-to-Give Solution】Forget shopping for separate parts. This curated Gift Basket Kit saves you time and effort, providing a complete, cohesive setup. It guarantees a lovingly assembled presentation for any celebration, from Easter to holidays

【Versatile & Reusable Beyond Gifting】Beyond celebrations, this Empty Hamper Basket serves as stylish home decor—use for storage, organization, or a centerpiece. Its collapsible design saves space, offering long-term value and versatility long after the event

specifications_table.Occasion: Baby Shower, Christmas, Easter, Housewarming, Wedding
